As editors, we are constantly chasing the culture. >> [music] >> Navigating the galleries at Art Basel, hunting for street style, or soaking in the high-octane Coachella vibes. The shots that usually haunt our feeds, they're captured on pro DSLRs with massive [music] lenses. Powerful, sure, but they're heavy, pricey, and completely pull you out of the moment. [music] Since smartphones are the primary camera for most, packing DSLR-level telephoto power into a slim module is a major challenge. The Oppo Find X9 Ultra overcomes this limitation. We introduced the industry's first periscope telephoto lens with Find X6. We developed the industry's first periscope mid-telephoto [music] camera with a large sensor. In Find X8, we introduced the first triple prism fold [music] refraction system, significantly reducing the telephoto module size. This year, we have finally brought a new Hasselblad 10x optical telephoto camera for Find X9 Ultra. This is the first-ever 15x pixel 10x optical telephoto camera on a smartphone. >> On the surface, [music] each generation of telephoto module may look similar, but internally, every generation has been completely re-engineered. >> We wanted to fundamentally redefine what a device in your pocket is capable for. But, [music] 2 10x optical zoom in a thin smartphone was long seen as impossible. If you wanted higher magnification, it means compromising image quality. While traditional cameras simply use longer lenses, smartphones must remain thin, necessitating a folded optical path. Consequently, we developed the industry's first quintuple prism reflection periscope structure. Our unique optical structure cut module length by 30% from 41 mm to 29 mm, while housing the largest sensor and aperture ever in a 10x telephoto system. The Find X9 Ultra increases light intake by 222% over other 10x solutions. Since reflections can cause stray light and degrade quality, we created Oppo's pristine optical path architecture. By refining reflective surface materials and precision, we minimize signal loss and deviation. We added nanometer scale diaphragms to prism surfaces to absorb stray light and an ultra-thin air capsule [music] to keep light confined. Reduced stray light transmittance to 0.001%, ensuring [music] a pure optical path. >> We implement a three rounds of active optical alignment, dynamically adjusting the position of lens, sensor, and the prism assembly during manufacturing. At 10 times, even the slightest hand movement is amplified. So, we designed precision sensor shift OS within an industry-leading stabilization range. Now, the quintuple prism reflection periscope structure is a major achievement in itself. Laboratory level precision, built for the real world. >> [music] >> Scale down the size, not the ambition. Oppo Find [music] X9 Ultra, your next camera.
